div.p: Component: P2P Networking Layer | Protocol: Custom UDP Gossip Spec Version: v2.1.0 | Author: Technical Design Artist

ul.li: Convergence: O(log N) rounds required for cluster-wide consistency.
Entropy: Peer selection uses Fisher-Yates for uniform distribution.
Network: UDP MTU capped at 1400B to avoid IP fragmentation.
Versioning: Delta tracking based on monotonic version increments.
